frontend/src/components/ContentEditor.ts.changes: Added Portuguese localization to all UI labels and placeholders
key_strings_localized: Short Video (1 min) → Vídeo Curto (1 min)
Long Video (10 min) → Vídeo Longo (10 min)

key_features: Read-only version viewer with title and body display
Snapshot reason labels fully localized to Portuguese
frontend/src/components/VersionHistory.t.performance_optimization: useMemo for validation lookup Map to avoid O(n) searches

frontend/src/pages/EditorPage.tsx.changes: Integrated VersionHistory component and added version/validation data fetching
integration_points: Fetch versions and validations on content load

patterns_discovered.localization_strategy: Hardcoded Portuguese strings throughout components with locale-specific date formatting
patterns_discovered.component_composition: VersionHistory as standalone card component with controlled selection state
patterns_discovered.data_fetching: Parallel fetch operations (versions and validations) triggered on mount and after save
patterns_discovered.error_handling: Silent failure pattern - catch blocks set empty arrays instead of propagating errors
patterns_discovered.performance_optimization: useMemo prevents recalculation of validation Map on every render
patterns_discovered.ui_patterns: Card-based layout with scrollable lists, read-only viewers, and color-coded status indicators
patterns_discovered.state_management: useState for simple state, useCallback for stable function references in dependencies

gotchas_discovered.validation_latest_version: Map stores only the most recent ValidationResult per version_number (date comparison)
gotchas_discovered.version_selection_toggle: Clicking selected version deselects it (isSelected ? null : version logic)
gotchas_discovered.silent_api_failures: Network errors in fetchVersions/fetchValidations set empty arrays without user feedback
gotchas_discovered.hardcoded_portuguese: Localization not extracted to translation files - future i18n changes require code modifications
gotchas_discovered.validation_score_boundaries: Boundary at score=50 creates yellow/red transition; score=80 creates yellow/green transition
gotchas_discovered.readonly_textarea_styling: bg-muted/50 used to indicate read-only state (no disabled attribute)
gotchas_discovered.date_format_coupling: Date formatting tightly coupled to Portuguese locale - changing locale requires code change

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Implemented complete version history UI with Portuguese localization. Created modular VersionHistory component with version selection, read-only viewer, and validation score display. Integrated into EditorPage with proper data fetching on load and after save operations. All UI strings translated to Portuguese using locale-specific date formatting.
recommendations: Extract Portuguese strings to i18n/translation files (e.g., pt-BR.json) for maintainability and future language support
Add error feedback UI for failed version/validation fetches instead of silent failures
Implement pagination or virtualization for version lists with many items (current max-height may truncate useful history)
Consider memoizing VersionHistory component to prevent unnecessary re-renders when versions haven't changed
Add version diff view to compare changes between versions
Implement request caching/deduplication to prevent redundant API calls if component remounts
Add accessibility attributes (aria-labels) to toggle buttons and version items
Consider extracting validation score color logic to a utility function for consistency and testability
